Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Encounter Records RIFs Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.7 34 

CLM_OBSLT_DT 

LABEL: Claim Obsolete Date 

DESCRIPTION: The date the claim is no longer the latest action (including chart reviews that link to an original claim). 

SHORT NAME: CLM_OBSLT_DT 

LONG NAME: CLM_OBSLT_DT 

TYPE: DATE 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: CMS Integrated Data Repository (IDR) 

FILE(S): IP base 
SNF base 
HH base 
OP base 
Carrier base 
DME base 

VALUES: —
